events.event_description: Embassy Algiers established as William James Porter presented credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador to Algeria.

evidence.quote: William James Porter, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1962-11-29. Credentials presented: 1962-12-17.

events.event_description: Algeria severed diplomatic relations with the United States; a U.S. Interests Section was established in the Swiss Embassy.

evidence.quote: Algeria severed diplomatic relations with the United States on June 6, 1967. A U.S. Interests Section was established in the Swiss Embassy.

events.event_description: Embassy Algiers was re-established, restoring full diplomatic representation.
